review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify the implementation changes are limited to creating 'tasks/v0.7-m3-b-self-repair-model.md'.

Verify the markdown file explicitly answers the 6 mandatory questions: what can happen automatically, what must be independently approved, how to prevent silent self-modification, how to ensure auditability, how to prevent rubber-stamp review, and how to distinguish a retry from an escalated problem pattern.
Verify NO implementation of unapproved self-modification logic occurred.
Verify NO rewriting of the governance, review, or gatekeeper mechanisms themselves occurred.
Verify NO execution of .agent-state/ migrations or environment adaptations occurred.
Verify NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models occurred.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
